title: Editor polish + video: text font/scale, color picker + MRU, playback/trim/crop, MP4/GIF export
goal: Finish the remaining editor-polish items from the user's report and add the video-editing surface for recordings from phase 12. Text/color model changes go in PhotonzCore (TDD); video trim/crop math is testable core; playback/export plumbing (AVPlayer/AVAssetExportSession/CGImageDestination GIF) is app-side.

decisions.execution: Two parallel git worktrees: Track A (image editor: 13.1 then 13.2 — both touch EditorState/EditorView so sequential within the track) and Track B (video: 13.3 -> 13.4 -> 13.5, strict chain). Disjoint files so the tracks run concurrently. Parent updates plan/log/overview centrally to avoid merge conflicts; track agents touch code + tests only.
decisions.13.1: Properties-panel approach: selecting a text element exposes adjustable font SIZE, WEIGHT, and FACE in the props panel. NOT drag-handle glyph rescaling. Mirror AnnotationBuilder.restyled with a new TextBuilder.restyled; keep auto-contrast shadow on color change; re-measure frame app-side via TextRasterizer.naturalSize.
decisions.13.2: Bespoke on-brand HSB color picker WITH a screen eyedropper (NSColorSampler) + a persisted recents row SHARED across annotations/text/borders. Eyedropper is Screen-Recording-TCC-gated and returns non-sRGB -> canonicalize via new RGBA.hexString + usingColorSpace(.sRGB). New core types: RecentColors (Codable/Sendable, case-insensitive dedupe, move-to-front, cap ~8-12) + RGBA.hexString. Own UserDefaults key 'recentColors'.
decisions.13.3: Custom Liquid-Glass scrubber/timeline with draggable in/out trim handles bound to a pure VideoTrim model. Sibling VideoEditorState (@MainActor @Observable) keeps EditorState pure; new EditorWindowID.video(URL). Trim/crop in-memory per window for v1 (lost on close, non-destructive until export).
decisions.13.4: Reuse Crop.swift/Geometry.clampCrop patterns; store VideoCrop rect in natural-video-pixel space (top-left origin), apply on export only.
decisions.13.5: Extend AnimatedExportPlanner for trim+crop; VideoExporter gains MP4 re-export (AVMutableComposition trim incl. audio + AVMutableVideoComposition crop -> AVAssetExportSession H.264). Skip re-encode (fast verbatim copy) when no trim/crop present. Surface size/quality options. WebP stays deferred (no libwebp).

tasks.title: Text element: change font and size/scale after placement
tasks.notes: DONE (commit 50994a0, Track A). TextBuilder.restyled added (mirrors AnnotationBuilder.restyled; preserves id+frame, refreshes auto-contrast shadow only on color change, non-text passes through). EditorState.selectedTextLayer + 4 text setters branch onto the selected layer in one History.perform, re-measure frame via TextRasterizer.naturalSize, and still update the global textStyles default. UI in BOTH the toolbar style popover AND a new docked Text inspector section (LayersPanel, InspectorSectionID.text). Tests: TextStylesTests TextBuilderRestyledTests (7) + TextRasterizerTests naturalSizeGrows (1). NEEDS interactive verify: select placed text -> change face/size/weight/color re-renders + single-step undo.

tasks.title: Color picker overhaul: custom colors + recents/MRU palette
tasks.notes: DONE (commit 0f23cf8, Track A). New core RecentColors (case-insensitive dedupe/move-to-front/cap 10, validates via RGBA) + RGBA.hexString serializer. EditorState.recentColors persisted under 'recentColors' UserDefaults key; single recordRecentColor funnel on every COMMIT path (annotation, per-layer annotation, text, callout border, LayerStyle border/shadow). New ColorPickerPopover: bespoke HSB sliders + hex field + NSColorSampler eyedropper (canonicalized via usingColorSpace(.sRGB)+hexString); shared recents row across annotations/text/borders. Tests: RecentColorsTests (8) + RGBATests hexString (3). NEEDS interactive verify: eyedropper needs Screen-Recording TCC (degrades gracefully if denied); recents shared + survive relaunch.

tasks.title: Video playback + trim (in/out points)
tasks.notes: DONE (commit d48a2c6, Track B). Core VideoEdit.swift VideoTrim (clamp [0,duration], min-duration, push-don't-invert both ways, timeRange/effectiveDuration/isTrimmed, Codable; 10 tests). App: EditorWindowID.video(URL); @MainActor @Observable VideoEditorState (owns AVPlayer/AVPlayerItem, loops within [in,out] via periodic observer, nonisolated deinit cleanup); VideoEditorView (AVKit AVPlayerView); TrimTimeline (custom glass scrubber + draggable in/out handles); PhotonzApp EditorRootView branches on windowID + parallel videoEditorState focused value + Video menu; AppCoordinator.openRecording opens .video window (Reveal-in-Finder fallback). NEEDS interactive verify: real-clip playback + loop (playback NOT TCC-gated; only capture is).

tasks.title: Video crop to a region
tasks.notes: DONE (commit 10b4133, Track B). Core VideoCrop (CGRect natural-video-pixel top-left + aspect lock; clamp via Geometry.clampCrop; reuses Crop/CropAspect resize/move/drag verbatim; outputSize/isCropped; 9 tests). App: crop state + begin/commit/cancel/clear on VideoEditorState; VideoCropOverlay (dim surround, thirds grid, 8 handles, movable body; maps video-pixel <-> aspect-fit display rect); crop toggle + aspect picker + Video>Crop menu. Non-destructive (apply on export). NEEDS interactive verify: crop clamps to video bounds; top-left vs bottom-left flip + preferredTransform correctness lands at export (13.5).

tasks.title: Export video as MP4, animated GIF, and animated HEIC
tasks.notes: DONE (commit 973c69b, Track B). Core: AnimatedExportPlan.trimStart + offset sampleTime; planner overloads taking VideoTrim(+VideoCrop) -> frameCount from trimmed duration, plan.size from crop output; VideoExportQuality preset (high/standard/small) + preset->plan helper (8 tests). App: VideoExporter.exportAnimated samples within [in,out] + per-frame CGImage crop then scale to plan.size; NEW exportMP4 (AVMutableComposition insertTimeRange video+audio, AVMutableVideoComposition renderSize=crop, layer transform = preferredTransform ∘ translate-to-crop-origin, modern export(to:as:)); AppCoordinator.saveRecording verbatim-copies when unedited, re-encodes when trimmed/cropped; isExportingRecording flag + error alert; quality submenus. WebP stays in backlog (no libwebp). FOLLOW-UP: 3 deprecation warnings (AVMutableVideoComposition & friends deprecated macOS 26 -> .Configuration builders). NEEDS interactive verify on a REAL clip: MP4 duration==trimmed length, audio in sync, crop region correct (no Y-flip), GIF/HEIC crop matches MP4.
